name: Stir-Fried Shrimp & Vegetables W/Crisp Noodle
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Bamboo shoots, drained and diced
8 oz Fresh shrimp, peel, devein, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mushrooms in a bowl. Add enough hot water to cover. Let stand until softened, about 30 minutes.
2. Drain the mushrooms and cut off their stems. Dice the mushroom caps. (This can be prepared up to one day ahead; cover and refrigerate.)
3. Heat oil in a wok or large deep pot to 375 degrees.
4. Add vermicelli in batches and fry until crisp, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the vermicelli to paper towels and drain.
5. Combine water, cornstarch, and soy sauce in a small bowl and stir to dissolve the cornstarch. Line a platter with lettuce leaves.
6. Heat sesame oil in the wok or heavy large skillet over high heat. Add mushrooms, bamboo shoots, carrot, celery, and onion and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Transfer to the bowl.
7. Heat chili oil in the same wok. Add minced garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 10 seconds. Add shrimp and stir-fry for 20 seconds. Return the vegetable mixture to the wok.
8. Stir the cornstarch mixture and add it to the wok. Stir-fry until the sauce thickens slightly, about 30 seconds.
9. Place vermicelli in the center of the platter. Top with shrimp mixture.
